title: Pronunciation Guide
text: Pronunciation Guide CHARACTERS Feyre: Fay-ruh Tamlin: Tam-lin Lucien: Loo-shien Rhysand: Ree-sand (Rhys: Reese) Alis: Alice Amarantha: Am-a-ran-tha PLACES Prythian: Prith-ee-en Hybern: Hi-burn OTHER Attor: At-tor Suriel: Sur-ee-el Bogge: Boh-ghi Puca: Pu-kah Naga: Nah-gah Calanmai: Cal-an-may
